name: Oscillators & Signal Generation
description: Sub-sector template for oscillator patents (CPC H03B*) including voltage-controlled oscillators, crystal oscillators, ring oscillators, and LC tanks.
contextDescription: Oscillator patents cover frequency generation, the foundation of all clocked and RF systems. Key types include voltage-controlled oscillators (VCOs), crystal oscillators (XOs/TCXOs), ring oscillators, LC oscillators, and relaxation oscillators. Every PLL contains an oscillator, every wireless transceiver needs a local oscillator, and every processor needs a clock reference. High-value targets include all wireless chipset vendors, clock IC vendors (SiTime, TI, Analog Devices), and RF module vendors (Skyworks, Qorvo).
scoringGuidance: VCO phase noise is the fundamental limit on wireless system performance.
LC-VCO patents with wide tuning range target multi-band transceivers.
Ring oscillator patents target CMOS SoC integration where inductors are costly.
Low-power oscillator patents target IoT, wearable, and always-on applications.
Digitally-controlled oscillators (DCO) enable all-digital PLLs for advanced nodes.

questions.question: What oscillator type does this patent cover? Score by market impact: 1-3 for specialized (relaxation, Colpitts), 4-6 for common (ring oscillator, crystal), 7-10 for high-value (LC-VCO, DCO, MEMS oscillator).
questions.reasoningPrompt: Identify the oscillator type and its role in electronic systems.

questions.question: Does this patent improve phase noise or spectral purity? Phase noise directly limits wireless link performance, radar resolution, and SerDes data rates.
questions.reasoningPrompt: Assess phase noise improvement and its system-level impact.

questions.question: Does this patent enable wide frequency tuning range or multi-band operation? Multi-band VCOs reduce die area and support more wireless standards.
questions.reasoningPrompt: Identify tuning range and multi-band capability.

questions.question: Is this oscillator designed for CMOS integration and process scalability? On-chip oscillators eliminate external components and enable SoC integration.
questions.reasoningPrompt: Assess CMOS compatibility and ability to scale across process nodes.
